title: hieracium glaucinum subsp. venulosum
intro: Hieracium glaucinum subsp. venulosum, also known as Rough Hawk's Beard, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and anti-inflammatory agent, helping to reduce swelling and alleviate pain. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including lowering blood pressure, reducing the risk of kidney stones, and aiding in the treatment of urinary tract infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Rough Hawk's Beard are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
